decisions: Canonical state lives under .agent-memory and projects into docs/agent-memory.
Automation, integration, MCP workflow, retention, and dogfood are all first-class product surfaces.
The repository now self-hosts its own memory and integration baseline.
src/commands: CLI entrypoints for operator-facing actions.
src/core: Canonical memory, automation, integration, query, and workflow orchestration.
scripts/dogfood: Repo self-host exercise and repair flows.
test: Unit, CLI integration, retention, workflow, and dogfood coverage.
gotchas: Dogfood provider auth is environment-dependent: Dogfood scripts rely on Codex or Claude availability unless overridden.
nextStepHints: Keep the self-host baseline fresh: Run npm run dogfood:init after major dogfood flow changes.
Use dogfood exercise before shipping big changes: Run npm run dogfood:exercise.
validationObservations: Baseline validation was synthesized for self-host initialization.

npm test: Test suite command is available.
